title: Conflict card component
description: Rich conflict display with side-by-side events and payload diff highlighting
close_reason: Conflict card component created with three visual treatments (same-name, same-aggregate, assumption-conflict)

title: Events view (card-view) redesign
description: Collapsible aggregate sections, summary stats bar, selectedAggregate filtering
close_reason: Events view redesigned with collapsible aggregates, stats bar, color coding

title: Add server build and run scripts
description: Add package.json scripts: build:server (tsc -p tsconfig.server.json) and server:dev (tsx src/server/mcp.ts for development). Add .gitignore entry for dist-server/. Does not modify existing build, dev, or test scripts.

title: Store extensions for sidebar/aggregate filtering
description: Add selectedAggregate, sidebarCollapsed, fileManagerOpen to AppState with methods
close_reason: Store extended with selectedAggregate, sidebarCollapsed, fileManagerOpen

title: Persistence & session history with MCP tools
description: Storage layer (IndexedDB) that currently doesn't exist — everything is in-memory. Session timeline, decision log, team roster, notification preferences. MCP tools: history/sessions, history/decisions, team/roster, team/update. New storage lib, persistence middleware for the store, history and team components. Handles storage mechanics, not artifact definitions. No real-time sync.

title: MCP server skeleton
description: Minimal MCP server that registers with Claude Code and serves zero tools. Establishes server infrastructure — transport (stdio or SSE), tool registration pattern, connection to the in-memory store. New src/server/ directory, mcp.ts entrypoint, package.json script. No tools, no business logic — just plumbing. Runs as a separate process from Vite dev server.
close_reason: Decomposed into 5 subtasks: 6wd (deps), fk3 (tsconfig), usw (entrypoint), 17c (scripts), jkv (registration)

title: Add expand/collapse for aggregate groups
description: Allow collapsing all events in an aggregate into a single summary node showing event count. Expand to see individual events with their edges. Default state: collapsed at overview zoom, expanded at detail zoom (ties into semantic zoom). Double-click or chevron icon toggles. Re-run ELK layout on expand/collapse with animated transition. Store expanded/collapsed state per aggregate.

title: Add path tracing (click node to highlight upstream/downstream)
description: Click an aggregate or external node to highlight all upstream and downstream connections via BFS/DFS over the edge adjacency list. Ghost non-connected nodes/edges to opacity 0.1. Show directional flow: upstream in one color tint, downstream in another. Click background or press Escape to clear. Build adjacency lookup from links array on graph build.

title: Replace force layout with ELK.js layered layout engine
description: Install elkjs. Replace d3-force simulation with ELK's layered (Sugiyama) algorithm for directional top-to-bottom or left-to-right flow. Map aggregates and externals to ELK graph nodes, domain events to edges. Run layout async (ELK returns a promise). Position SVG elements from ELK output coordinates. This is the foundational change — all other tasks build on it.

title: Contract & integration visualization with MCP tools
description: Schema browser, cross-boundary map, contract diff, mock inspector, integration report viewer, go/no-go checklist. MCP tools: contract/load, contract/diff, integration/load, integration/status. New schema types for contracts and integration reports. Visualizes artifacts from external tackline commands (/formalize, /integrate) — does not produce them. Depends on jam artifact types from Part 2 for provenance tracing.

title: Add complex fixture (session-orchestration.yaml)
description: Copy the 30-event session-orchestration YAML as a fixture for testing the UX redesign with complex data

title: Improve edge routing and label placement
description: Switch to ELK's orthogonal or spline edge routing to eliminate the overlapping Bezier mess. Use textPath with startOffset=50% for edge labels along curves. Implement edge bundling for multi-edge groups (4+ edges between same aggregate pair collapse into single labeled bundle). Fix self-loop rendering. Arrow markers should be crisp and directional.

title: Wire existing confidence/direction filters to flow diagram
description: AppState already tracks filters.confidence and filters.direction but the flow diagram ignores them. Wire these in: ghost filtered-out edges to opacity 0.1 (filter-in-place preserves spatial context). Add smooth opacity transitions. Filtered edges should be non-interactive (no hover/click). This is low-hanging fruit — the state and UI already exist.

title: Assumption list improvements
description: Collapsible, color coding, conflict cross-reference
close_reason: Assumption list rewritten with collapsible type groups, conflict cross-referencing, and stats bar

title: Install MCP SDK dependencies
description: Add @modelcontextprotocol/server and zod to package.json. Run npm install. No code changes, no tsconfig changes — just dependency installation.

title: Aggregate color utility
description: Pure function for stable color assignment per aggregate (mod 8 palette)

title: Conflicts view redesign
description: Conflict-first: dashboard header with counts, conflict cards, agreements section
close_reason: Conflict-first dashboard with stat cards, categorized sections, and collapsible role panels

title: Optional force layout exploration view
description: Keep the force-directed layout as a toggle-able alternate view for organic cluster exploration. Add d3-force-clustering to group nodes by aggregate with convex hull overlays. Provide a toolbar toggle between ELK (directional) and Force (exploratory) modes. Animate transition between layouts.

title: Add smooth animated transitions for layout changes
description: Use d3-transition to animate node/edge position changes when: filters toggle, aggregates expand/collapse, layout mode switches, search highlights. Transition duration 300-500ms with easeQuadInOut. For filtering: transition opacity before adding/removing elements. For layout: interpolate node positions from old to new. Use simulation.alphaTarget() pattern for force layout transitions.

title: Add semantic zoom (level-of-detail rendering)
description: Implement zoom-level-dependent rendering: Low zoom (k<0.6): aggregate clusters as single glyphs with event count badges, no individual edges. Medium zoom (0.6<k<1.2): individual nodes with short labels, edges visible. High zoom (k>1.2): full labels, metadata badges, confidence indicators, edge labels. Check transform.k against thresholds in zoom handler. Use CSS transitions for smooth appearance/disappearance.

title: Workflow navigator & phase engine with MCP tools
description: Phase indicator, transition guidance, artifact inventory, re-entry support. State machine infers current workflow phase from which artifacts exist. MCP tools: workflow/phase, workflow/inventory. New workflow-engine lib and nav component. Reads artifact presence from all other parts — does not own any artifact type. Must be built after Parts 1-3 define their artifact shapes.

title: Implement compound nodes for aggregate grouping
description: Use ELK's compound node support to render aggregates as container nodes with their domain events as children inside them. External systems remain as standalone nodes outside any compound group. This replaces the flat node layout with a structurally nested hierarchy that shows aggregate boundaries visually. Depends on ELK.js integration.

title: App shell layout restructure
description: CSS Grid layout with sidebar, compact header, file pills, tab renaming (Events/Flow/Conflicts)
close_reason: CSS Grid layout with sidebar, compact header, tab renaming done

title: Aggregate nav sidebar component
description: Aggregate tree with event counts, click-to-filter, color indicators

title: Filter panel component
description: Sidebar component for confidence/direction filters replacing inline checkboxes

title: Flow diagram improvements
description: Layered layout, bezier edges, zoom/pan, click-to-filter, label bg rects
close_reason: Flow diagram rewritten with D3 force layout and d3-zoom for automatic node positioning and smooth pan/zoom

title: Create server-specific tsconfig
description: Create tsconfig.server.json at project root. Extends base tsconfig but overrides for Node target: removes DOM libs, sets moduleResolution node16, sets outDir dist-server, includes only src/server/**. Removes noEmit (must emit JS for server process). Does not modify existing tsconfig.json.

title: Event card redesign
description: Tighter spacing, aggregate color border, hover elevation, highlight mode for conflicts
close_reason: Event card redesigned with aggregate color, highlight, tighter layout

title: Add text search with node highlighting
description: Add a search input above the flow diagram. As the user types, match against node labels (aggregate names, external system names). Matching nodes stay full opacity, non-matches ghost to 0.1. Clear search restores all nodes. Debounce input (300ms). Show match count. Enter key cycles through matches (pan/zoom to center each match).

title: Register MCP server with Claude Code
description: Create .mcp.json at project root for project-scope registration pointing to the built server entrypoint. Verify server connects successfully via /mcp in Claude Code. No tool definitions — downstream beads add those. Stdio transport only.

title: Add keyboard navigation and accessibility
description: Implement roving tabindex pattern: graph container gets tabindex=0, nodes get tabindex=-1. Arrow keys traverse adjacent nodes via adjacency list. Enter/Space activates (expand, select). Escape deselects/clears. Tab exits graph. Add aria-activedescendant, role=application on container, aria-label on nodes with name and connection count. WCAG 2.1 AA target.

title: Grouping utility
description: Extract groupByAggregate, add getAllAggregates()

title: Add rich tooltips and slide-out detail panel
description: Upgrade hover tooltips from basic text to rich HTML cards (event name, trigger, confidence, aggregate, notes). On node click, show a slide-out detail panel on the right with full node data: all events in the aggregate, their connections, confidence levels, and cross-role comparison data. Panel can include navigation to related nodes (click a connected aggregate to pan to it).

title: Epic: Rebuild flow viewer with ELK.js layout and rich interactivity
description: Replace the current force-directed flow diagram with an ELK.js-powered layered layout featuring compound nodes, clean edge routing, semantic zoom, path tracing, filtering, minimap, search, and keyboard navigation. See /gather research findings in session context for full rationale.

title: Improve comparison mode with synchronized side-by-side views
description: When 2+ files loaded, offer juxtaposition mode: two graphs side by side with consistent node positioning (same ELK layout params) and synchronized pan/zoom. Linked brushing: select a node in one view, highlight the corresponding node in the other. Also offer overlay diff mode: merge both graphs, color shared events green, model-A-only blue, model-B-only red.

title: Design tokens and global styles
description: Add JetBrains Mono font, Shoelace token overrides for indigo palette, aggregate color CSS custom properties, body typography

title: Redesign file-drop-zone (hero + drawer modes)
description: Hero mode for empty state with topographic CSS bg, drawer mode when files loaded
close_reason: Hero + compact modes with topographic bg

title: Add minimap navigation panel
description: Render a scaled-down replica of the full graph in a corner panel (bottom-right). Show a viewport rectangle that tracks the main view's pan/zoom. Users can drag the rectangle to navigate. Bidirectional sync between minimap and main canvas zoom transforms. Suppress re-entrant events between the two zoom handlers. Reference: Bill White's D3 minimap pattern.

title: Run agent-generator to create project agents
Write MCP server entrypoint
description: Create src/server/ directory with mcp.ts entrypoint. Creates McpServer with name/version, creates StdioServerTransport, connects them. Wraps in async main() with process.exit(1) on fatal error. All logging to console.error(). Imports store from src/state/app-state.ts to establish connection point. No tool registration, no business logic — just server bootstrap proving stdio transport works.

title: Prep workspace enhancement with MCP tools
description: Enrich existing storm-prep viewing: assumption spotlight, confidence heatmap, prep completeness check. MCP tools: prep/load (agent pushes YAML directly), prep/status (query completeness — event count, assumption count, unresolved questions). Extends existing components (assumption-list, event-card) and adds new completeness lib. No new shared types, no multi-file comparison, no persistence. Independent — no changes to types.ts or app-state.ts shape.

title: Jam session artifacts & resolution with MCP tools
description: New data model for jam outcomes — agreements, conflict resolutions, ownership assignments, unresolved items. Upgrades comparison-view from read-only to interactive. MCP tools: jam/start, jam/resolve, jam/assign, jam/export. Modifies types.ts and app-state.ts. Central new capability — jam artifact feeds downstream Formalize phase. Vision sections 2 + parts of 8 (ownership map).
